strands.title: Local Protocol Boundary
strands.content: User has established an explicit caveat: local command messages should not be responded to or integrated into reasoning unless explicitly requested. This caveat is reaffirmed in cycle 2 and again in cycle 3 (turns 7-9). The protocol boundary remains governing and actively maintained.
key_claims: Local command messages are filtered from reasoning integration
Explicit user request is required to override this filter

strands.title: Working Directory Registration
strands.content: User registered ~/projects (/home/tony/projects) as a working directory in cycle 1. This directory is persisted in local settings with permissions management capability.

strands.title: Model Configuration Context
strands.content: Model selection command executed in cycle 3 with argument claude-opus-4-6. Per established local protocol boundary, command execution and output are registered as environmental context but not integrated into reasoning content. The configured model context is noted but compartmentalized.
key_claims: Integration status: FILTERED per local protocol

declared_losses.description: Command output (stdout) from /model command is noted but not semantically integrated into reasoning strands
declared_losses.reason: Local protocol caveat filter applied per established boundary

open_questions: What substantive reasoning task will the user initiate next?
